title: neotinea ustulata f. aestivalis
intro: Neotinea ustulata f. aestivalis is a variant of the Neotinea ustulata species, also known as the Burnt Orchid, a type of terrestrial orchid found in Europe and North Africa. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neotinea ustulata f. aestivalis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
